creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Oops, I forgot to put ipv6 back to the CATEGORIES. Again please use
patch below instead of previous ones.

Regards.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr1/freebsd/cvsroot/ports/ftp/ncftp3/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.107
diff -u -r1.107 Makefile
--- Makefile	7 May 2006 11:09:20 -0000	1.107
+++ Makefile	11 Aug 2006 17:26:39 -0000
@@ -7,20 +7,20 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	ncftp
-PORTVERSION=	3.1.9
-PORTREVISION?=	0
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	ftp ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ncftp.com/ncftp/
 DISTNAME=	ncftp-${PORTVERSION}-src
 
 PATCH_SITES=	ftp://ftp.kame.net/pub/kame/misc/
-PATCHFILES=	ncftp-319-v6-20050419.diff.gz
+PATCHFILES=	ncftp-320-v6-20060806.diff.gz
 PATCH_DIST_STRIP=	-p1
 
 MAINTAINER=	obrien@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	ftp replacement with advanced user interface
+COMMENT=	Ftp replacement with advanced user interface
 
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
 LATEST_LINK=	ncftp
 .endif
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME:S/-src//}
-INSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-ncurses
 PLIST_SUB=	NCFTP=${LATEST_LINK}
@@ -51,9 +51,9 @@
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 	    's|u_decodeurl.so u_decodeurl.so|u_decodeurl.so u_decodehost.so|' \
 	    ${WRKSRC}/libncftp/Makefile
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/Strn ; make so
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/libncftp ; make so
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/sio; make so
+	cd ${WRKSRC}/Strn ; ${GMAKE} so
+	cd ${WRKSRC}/libncftp ; ${GMAKE} so
+	cd ${WRKSRC}/sio; ${GMAKE} so
 
 do-install:
 	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/bin/ncftp ${PREFIX}/bin/${LATEST_LINK}
